This section **needs expansion**. You can help by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Saint-Patrice-de-Sherrington&action=edit&section=). *(November 2014)*

is a [municipality](/wiki/Municipality_(Quebec) "Municipality (Quebec)") in [Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality](/wiki/Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality "Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality") in [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada"), situated in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") administrative region. The population as of the [2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census") was 1,963.

["*Banque de noms de lieux du Québec*: Reference number 57382"](https://toponymie.gouv.qc.ca/ct/ToposWeb/fiche.aspx?no_seq=57382). *toponymie.gouv.qc.ca* (in French). [Commission de toponymie du Québec](/wiki/Commission_de_toponymie_du_Qu%C3%A9bec "Commission de toponymie du Québec").

["2021 Community Profiles"](https://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2021/dp-pd/prof/details/page.cfm?Lang=E&DGUIDlist=2021A00052468025). *[2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. February 4, 2022. Retrieved 2022-04-27.

["2016 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2016/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2016 Canadian census](/wiki/2016_Canadian_census "2016 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. August 12, 2021. Retrieved 2023-06-16.

["2011 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2011/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2011 Canadian census](/wiki/2011_Canadian_census "2011 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. March 21, 2019. Retrieved 2014-04-10.

King, M.J. (Chairperson of the board). "[South Shore Protestant Regional School Board](https://news.google.com/newspapers?nid=863&dat=19651216&id=WM0tAAAAIBAJ&sjid=wCoDAAAAIBAJ&pg=3288,6471414)" (St. Johns, PQ). *[The News and Eastern Townships Advocate](/wiki/The_News_and_Eastern_Townships_Advocate "The News and Eastern Townships Advocate")*. Volume 119, No. 5. Thursday December 16, 1965. p. 2. Retrieved from [Google News](/wiki/Google_News "Google News") on November 23, 2014.

**Saint-Patrice-de-Sherrington** is a [municipality](/wiki/Municipality_(Quebec) "Municipality (Quebec)") in [Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality](/wiki/Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality "Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality") in [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada"), situated in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") administrative region. The population as of the [2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census") was 1,963.
